name: Name
description: Human-readable name of the hazard model.

name: Version
description: Version identifier for this model revision.

name: Method
description: Computation method drawn from the Method collection (hydraulic, wind-field, seismic, thermal, crowd).

name: Parameters note
description: Free-text summary of configuration parameters (resolution, boundary conditions, return period, calibration notes).

name: Maintained by
description: Organisation responsible for maintaining the model.
